triggers.name: APC Smart-UPS: Battery has low capacity
APC Smart-UPS: Battery needs replacement
triggers.description: A battery installed has an internal error condition.

triggers.name: APC Smart-UPS: Battery has an internal error condition
triggers.description: A battery installed has an internal error condition.

triggers.name: APC Smart-UPS: Battery is Low
triggers.description: The UPS will be unable to sustain the current load, and its services will be lost if power is not restored.

triggers.name: APC Smart-UPS: Battery has high temperature
APC Smart-UPS: Unacceptable input frequency
triggers.expression: min(/APC Smart-UPS 2200 RM by SNMP/input.frequency[upsHighPrecInputFrequency],{$TIME.PERIOD}) > 0 and (min(/APC Smart-UPS 2200 RM by SNMP/input.frequency[upsHighPrecInputFrequency],{$TIME.PERIOD}) > {$UPS.INPUT_FREQ.MAX.WARN} or max(/APC Smart-UPS 2200 RM by SNMP/input.frequency[upsHighPrecInputFrequency],{$TIME.PERIOD}) < {$UPS.INPUT_FREQ.MIN.WARN})

triggers.name: APC Smart-UPS: Unacceptable input voltage
triggers.expression: min(/APC Smart-UPS 2200 RM by SNMP/input.voltage[upsHighPrecInputLineVoltage],{$TIME.PERIOD}) > 0 and (min(/APC Smart-UPS 2200 RM by SNMP/input.voltage[upsHighPrecInputLineVoltage],{$TIME.PERIOD}) > {$UPS.INPUT_VOLT.MAX.WARN} or max(/APC Smart-UPS 2200 RM by SNMP/input.voltage[upsHighPrecInputLineVoltage],{$TIME.PERIOD}) < {$UPS.INPUT_VOLT.MIN.WARN})

triggers.name: APC Smart-UPS: Output load is high
triggers.description: A battery installed has an internal error condition.

triggers.name: APC Smart-UPS: UPS is Emergency Static Bypass
APC Smart-UPS: UPS is Hardware Failure Bypass
APC Smart-UPS: UPS is Off
APC Smart-UPS: UPS is on battery
APC Smart-UPS: UPS is on Smart Boost
APC Smart-UPS: UPS is On Smart Trim
APC Smart-UPS: UPS is Rebooting
APC Smart-UPS: UPS is Sleeping Until Power Return
APC Smart-UPS: UPS is Software Bypass
APC Smart-UPS: UPS is Switched Bypass
APC Smart-UPS: UPS is Timed Sleeping
APC Smart-UPS: System name has changed
triggers.expression: last(/APC Smart-UPS 2200 RM by SNMP/system.name[sysName.0],#1)<>last(/APC Smart-UPS 2200 RM by SNMP/system.name[sysName.0],#2) and length(last(/APC Smart-UPS 2200 RM by SNMP/system.name[sysName.0]))>0
triggers.description: The name of the system has changed. Acknowledge to close the problem manually.

triggers.name: APC Smart-UPS: No SNMP data collection
triggers.description: SNMP is not available for polling. Please check device connectivity and SNMP settings.

triggers.name: APC Smart-UPS: Battery has low capacity
triggers.expression: last(/APC Smart-UPS RT 1000 RM XL by SNMP/battery.capacity[upsHighPrecBatteryCapacity]) < {$BATTERY.CAPACITY.MIN.WARN}

triggers.name: APC Smart-UPS: Battery needs replacement
triggers.expression: last(/APC Smart-UPS RT 1000 RM XL by SNMP/battery.replace_indicator[upsAdvBatteryReplaceIndicator])=2
triggers.description: A battery installed has an internal error condition.

triggers.name: APC Smart-UPS: Battery has an internal error condition
triggers.expression: last(/APC Smart-UPS RT 1000 RM XL by SNMP/battery.status[upsBasicBatteryStatus])=4
triggers.description: A battery installed has an internal error condition.

triggers.name: APC Smart-UPS: Battery is Low
triggers.expression: last(/APC Smart-UPS RT 1000 RM XL by SNMP/battery.status[upsBasicBatteryStatus])=3
triggers.description: The UPS will be unable to sustain the current load, and its services will be lost if power is not restored.

triggers.name: APC Smart-UPS: Battery has high temperature
triggers.expression: min(/APC Smart-UPS RT 1000 RM XL by SNMP/battery.temperature[upsHighPrecBatteryTemperature],{$TIME.PERIOD}) > {$BATTERY.TEMP.MAX.WARN}

triggers.name: APC Smart-UPS: Unacceptable input frequency
triggers.expression: min(/APC Smart-UPS RT 1000 RM XL by SNMP/input.frequency[upsHighPrecInputFrequency],{$TIME.PERIOD}) > 0 and (min(/APC Smart-UPS RT 1000 RM XL by SNMP/input.frequency[upsHighPrecInputFrequency],{$TIME.PERIOD}) > {$UPS.INPUT_FREQ.MAX.WARN} or max(/APC Smart-UPS RT 1000 RM XL by SNMP/input.frequency[upsHighPrecInputFrequency],{$TIME.PERIOD}) < {$UPS.INPUT_FREQ.MIN.WARN})

triggers.name: APC Smart-UPS: Unacceptable input voltage
triggers.expression: min(/APC Smart-UPS RT 1000 RM XL by SNMP/input.voltage[upsHighPrecInputLineVoltage],{$TIME.PERIOD}) > 0 and (min(/APC Smart-UPS RT 1000 RM XL by SNMP/input.voltage[upsHighPrecInputLineVoltage],{$TIME.PERIOD}) > {$UPS.INPUT_VOLT.MAX.WARN} or max(/APC Smart-UPS RT 1000 RM XL by SNMP/input.voltage[upsHighPrecInputLineVoltage],{$TIME.PERIOD}) < {$UPS.INPUT_VOLT.MIN.WARN})

triggers.name: APC Smart-UPS: Output load is high
triggers.expression: min(/APC Smart-UPS RT 1000 RM XL by SNMP/output.load[upsHighPrecOutputLoad],{$TIME.PERIOD}) > {$UPS.OUTPUT.MAX.WARN}
triggers.description: A battery installed has an internal error condition.

triggers.name: APC Smart-UPS: UPS is Emergency Static Bypass
triggers.expression: last(/APC Smart-UPS RT 1000 RM XL by SNMP/output.status[upsBasicOutputStatus])=16

triggers.name: APC Smart-UPS: UPS is Hardware Failure Bypass
triggers.expression: last(/APC Smart-UPS RT 1000 RM XL by SNMP/output.status[upsBasicOutputStatus])=10

triggers.name: APC Smart-UPS: UPS is Off
triggers.expression: last(/APC Smart-UPS RT 1000 RM XL by SNMP/output.status[upsBasicOutputStatus])=7

triggers.name: APC Smart-UPS: UPS is on battery
triggers.expression: last(/APC Smart-UPS RT 1000 RM XL by SNMP/output.status[upsBasicOutputStatus])=3

triggers.name: APC Smart-UPS: UPS is on Smart Boost
triggers.expression: last(/APC Smart-UPS RT 1000 RM XL by SNMP/output.status[upsBasicOutputStatus])=4

triggers.name: APC Smart-UPS: UPS is On Smart Trim
triggers.expression: last(/APC Smart-UPS RT 1000 RM XL by SNMP/output.status[upsBasicOutputStatus])=12

triggers.name: APC Smart-UPS: UPS is Rebooting
triggers.expression: last(/APC Smart-UPS RT 1000 RM XL by SNMP/output.status[upsBasicOutputStatus])=8

triggers.name: APC Smart-UPS: UPS is Sleeping Until Power Return
triggers.expression: last(/APC Smart-UPS RT 1000 RM XL by SNMP/output.status[upsBasicOutputStatus])=11

triggers.name: APC Smart-UPS: UPS is Software Bypass
triggers.expression: last(/APC Smart-UPS RT 1000 RM XL by SNMP/output.status[upsBasicOutputStatus])=6

triggers.name: APC Smart-UPS: UPS is Switched Bypass
triggers.expression: last(/APC Smart-UPS RT 1000 RM XL by SNMP/output.status[upsBasicOutputStatus])=9

triggers.name: APC Smart-UPS: UPS is Timed Sleeping
triggers.expression: last(/APC Smart-UPS RT 1000 RM XL by SNMP/output.status[upsBasicOutputStatus])=5

triggers.name: APC Smart-UPS: System name has changed
triggers.expression: last(/APC Smart-UPS RT 1000 RM XL by SNMP/system.name[sysName.0],#1)<>last(/APC Smart-UPS RT 1000 RM XL by SNMP/system.name[sysName.0],#2) and length(last(/APC Smart-UPS RT 1000 RM XL by SNMP/system.name[sysName.0]))>0
triggers.description: The name of the system has changed. Acknowledge to close the problem manually.

triggers.name: APC Smart-UPS: No SNMP data collection
triggers.expression: max(/APC Smart-UPS RT 1000 RM XL by SNMP/zabbix[host,snmp,available],{$SNMP.TIMEOUT})=0
triggers.description: SNMP is not available for polling. Please check device connectivity and SNMP settings.

triggers.name: APC UPS Symmetra: Battery has high temperature
APC UPS Symmetra: Unacceptable input frequency
triggers.expression: min(/APC UPS Symmetra RM by SNMP/input.frequency[upsHighPrecInputFrequency],{$TIME.PERIOD}) > 0 and (min(/APC UPS Symmetra RM by SNMP/input.frequency[upsHighPrecInputFrequency],{$TIME.PERIOD}) > {$UPS.INPUT_FREQ.MAX.WARN} or max(/APC UPS Symmetra RM by SNMP/input.frequency[upsHighPrecInputFrequency],{$TIME.PERIOD}) < {$UPS.INPUT_FREQ.MIN.WARN})

triggers.name: APC UPS Symmetra: Unacceptable input voltage
triggers.expression: min(/APC UPS Symmetra RM by SNMP/input.voltage[upsHighPrecInputLineVoltage],{$TIME.PERIOD}) > 0 and (min(/APC UPS Symmetra RM by SNMP/input.voltage[upsHighPrecInputLineVoltage],{$TIME.PERIOD}) > {$UPS.INPUT_VOLT.MAX.WARN} or max(/APC UPS Symmetra RM by SNMP/input.voltage[upsHighPrecInputLineVoltage],{$TIME.PERIOD}) < {$UPS.INPUT_VOLT.MIN.WARN})

triggers.name: APC UPS Symmetra: Output load is high
triggers.description: A battery installed has an internal error condition.

triggers.name: APC UPS Symmetra: UPS is Emergency Static Bypass
APC UPS Symmetra: UPS is Hardware Failure Bypass
APC UPS Symmetra: UPS is Off
APC UPS Symmetra: UPS is on battery
APC UPS Symmetra: UPS is on Smart Boost
APC UPS Symmetra: UPS is On Smart Trim
APC UPS Symmetra: UPS is Rebooting
APC UPS Symmetra: UPS is Sleeping Until Power Return
APC UPS Symmetra: UPS is Software Bypass
APC UPS Symmetra: UPS is Switched Bypass
APC UPS Symmetra: UPS is Timed Sleeping
APC UPS Symmetra: System name has changed
triggers.expression: last(/APC UPS Symmetra RM by SNMP/system.name[sysName.0],#1)<>last(/APC UPS Symmetra RM by SNMP/system.name[sysName.0],#2) and length(last(/APC UPS Symmetra RM by SNMP/system.name[sysName.0]))>0
triggers.description: The name of the system has changed. Acknowledge to close the problem manually.

triggers.name: APC UPS Symmetra: No SNMP data collection
triggers.description: SNMP is not available for polling. Please check device connectivity and SNMP settings.

macros.description: Minimum battery capacity percentage for trigger expression.
Maximum battery temperature for trigger expression.
The time interval for SNMP agent availability trigger expression.
Time period for trigger expression.
Maximum input frequency for trigger expression.
Minimum input frequency for trigger expression.
Maximum input voltage for trigger expression.
Minimum input voltage for trigger expression.
Maximum output load in % for trigger expression.
